sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, c_col CLOB, ts_col TIMESTAMP(6));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, c_col, ts_col) VALUES (1, 'value1', timestamp(6) '2021-01-01 10:00:00.123456');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, c_col, ts_col) VALUES (2, 'value2', timestamp(6) '2020-12-31 23:59:59.000000');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, c_col, ts_col) VALUES (3, '', timestamp(6) '');
SELECT json.tojsonarray( (SELECT c_col FROM test_data WHERE id = 1) ) AS json_array, COALESCE(ts_col, timestamp(6) '2000-01-01 00:00:00.000000') AS effective_ts FROM test_data;

SELECT t.c_col, t.ts_col FROM test_data t JOIN (SELECT id, json.tojsonarray(c_col) AS json_array FROM test_data GROUP BY id) j ON t.id = j.id WHERE t.ts_col > timestamp(6) '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000000';
SELECT j AS json_array, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT json.tojsonarray(c_col) AS j FROM test_data GROUP BY c_col HAVING COUNT(id) > 1) grouped_json WHERE json_array IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, c_col FROM (SELECT id, json.tojsonarray(c_col) AS json_array FROM test_data GROUP BY id ORDER BY json_length(json_array), ts_col) AS ordered_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT json.tojsonarray(NULLIF(c_col, '')) AS json_array FROM test_data) AS distinct_arrays WHERE json_array IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_data ADD COLUMN new_ts_col TIMESTAMP(6) DEFAULT timestamp(6) '2021-01-01 09:00:00.000000';
UPDATE test_data SET new_ts_col = timestamp(6) '2022-11-11 11:11:11.111111' WHERE id = 1;
